linkedin.notes: HTML scraping, most reliable free source

indeed.notes: Requires SerpAPI key ($50/mo, 100 free). Direct scraping blocked by Cloudflare.

glassdoor.notes: Blocked by Cloudflare. Requires SerpAPI or Glassdoor Partner API.

talent.notes: Next.js site, extracts via JSON data

adzuna.notes: Free tier: 250 calls/mo. Sign up at developer.adzuna.com
